BEGIN:BMSG
VERSION:1.0
STATUS:READ
TYPE:SMS_GSM
FOLDER:telecom/msg/inbox
BEGIN:VCARD
FN:Alice Exa
 mple
TEL;TYPE=CELL:+123456
EMAIL:alice@example.com
END:VCARD
BEGIN:VCARD
N:Bob Example
TEL:+987654
EMAIL:bob@example.com
END:VCARD
BEGIN:BBODY
CHARSET:UTF-8
LENGTH:5
BEGIN:MSG
hello
END:MSG
BEGIN:MSG
world
END:MSG
END:BBODY
END:BMSG
